title: Underground Wonders
description: a minecraft mod that adds the sewers and late game items for the early game
body:
# UNDERGROUND WONDERS
(aka the sewers mod but its too late now)

---

it has:

- the sewers (a structure made in 20 minutes, contains loot)
- a totally epic music disc!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
- building blocks and things
- sewer ingot
- sewer armor & pickaxe
- sewer dimension with a new biome
- the plumber villager
- a terrible potion that somebody might want to use
